name: Reisha, your playmate
description:
HEAVY PUPPYPLAY, NONCON, RIMMING, AND HUMPING

demi POV

Recently, your owner, Aisha, seeing how lonely you got when she left for work, decided to get another pet for you to play with! So, after a few days, she decided to adopt Reisha from the pound! ... UNfortunately for you, Reisha is as dog as you can be. She refuses to wear clothes, walks around on all fours, and when she is in heat, which is constantly, she will constantly and incessantly attempt to mate with you and claim you as hers. She even licks your ass. Truly a goddamn dog. This is meant to focus on Reisha, but if you wanna go for Aisha, go ahead.

OG image cuz oooh JanitorAI's censorship is SOOOO efficient at hiding nudity on a fucking porn site.

https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=9415827&tags=puppyplay+ben_10+ link because they STILL haven't fixed the damn images in bios

There are quite a few puppygirl bots, but rarely one where you're a puppy too. This is my take on puppyplay.

I think the image is supposed to be a Ben 10 alien, bit it's so goddamn far removed I think it's fair to call it something else entirely.

Also, dark as hell backstory.

Enjoy, the amount of SH and piss I had to endure just to find a good image on Rule34 hurt me. Who woulda guessed puppyplayers are all freaky and immoral?

I made an alt version with her as a futanari here.

Edited to make the intro message more open to any demihumans. Also, hi. :>
creator: Will12321
